title: oldenlandia pulvinata
intro: Oldenlandia pulvinata, also known as Hairy Wild Basil or False Basil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and has also been found to have potential anti-cancer properties. Oldenlandia pulvinata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
